title: Birds aim for top spot
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - High-flying Oriented Birds registered a well deserved 1-0 victory against Ubuntu Spartans FC in a tough Western Cape ABC Motsepe Provincial League encounter on Saturday 15 February in the Bird's back yard, Kwanokuthula Stadium.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - High-flying Oriented Birds registered a well deserved 1-0 victory against Ubuntu Spartans FC in a tough Western Cape ABC Motsepe Provincial League encounter on Saturday 15 February in the Bird's back yard, Kwanokuthula Stadium."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The evergreen Khanyisani \"Mashesha\" Radebe, the captain of the Birds, netted the winning goal."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Moving up","html":"Moving up"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With 24 points, the Birds are in second position and are aiming for the top spot in Western Cape ABC Motsepe stream B.","html":"With 24 points, the Birds are in second position and are aiming for the top spot in Western Cape ABC Motsepe stream B."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They have played 12 games, winning seven, drawing three and losing two.","html":"They have played 12 games, winning seven, drawing three and losing two."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Central Karoo Region's Ubuntu Spartans, of Beaufort West, are at the bottom of the log table, with eight points.","html":"Central Karoo Region's Ubuntu Spartans, of Beaufort West, are at the bottom of the log table, with eight points."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Classic performance","html":"Classic performance"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"In the game, Spartans goalkeeper Likhanyiso Ngutyana (21) delivered a classic performance, denying the Birds clear-cut opportunities."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Khanyisani 'Mashesha' Radebe, the captain of Oriented Birds, with two of Birds chairman Zitho Lawrence Tyontwana's children, Mihle Tyontwana (6), left, and Nazi Tyontwana (4). Radebe struck the winning goal.","html":"Khanyisani 'Mashesha' Radebe, the captain of Oriented Birds, with two of Birds chairman Zitho Lawrence Tyontwana's children, Mihle Tyontwana (6), left, and Nazi Tyontwana (4). Radebe struck the winning goal."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The visitors started the fixture at a high tempo, orchestrating offensive play from the centre of the field.","html":"The visitors started the fixture at a high tempo, orchestrating offensive play from the centre of the field."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Taking control","html":"Taking control"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Birds then took control of the game, using the strength of Thabiso \"Mashumi\" Minana and Radebe, supported by Siyanda Madlala.","html":"The Birds then took control of the game, using the strength of Thabiso \"Mashumi\" Minana and Radebe, supported by Siyanda Madlala."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They received a corner kick, but their shot was well defended by the Spartans back line.","html":"They received a corner kick, but their shot was well defended by the Spartans back line."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Zinedine Dolf of Spartans looked very dangerous on the ball - creating more chances for his side.","html":"Zinedine Dolf of Spartans looked very dangerous on the ball - creating more chances for his side."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Both teams played an enterprising style of football in their search for an opening goal.","html":"Both teams played an enterprising style of football in their search for an opening goal."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Radebe attacks","html":"Radebe attacks"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"After an evenly balanced, goalless first half, the Birds started the second half at a fast pace.","html":"After an evenly balanced, goalless first half, the Birds started the second half at a fast pace."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Radebe launched an attack on the right side of the field, but was unable to break through the Spartans defenders.","html":"Radebe launched an attack on the right side of the field, but was unable to break through the Spartans defenders."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Spartans responded with a positive move from the centre of the field, but they failed to convert a clear-cut chance.","html":"Spartans responded with a positive move from the centre of the field, but they failed to convert a clear-cut chance."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Birds then displayed great touches, opening spaces on the right side of the field - and Rabebe scored."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Shot goes wide","html":"Shot goes wide"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"After Spartans had chased the game the Birds' Abonga Matthews tried his luck from the right corner, his powerful shot going wide.","html":"After Spartans had chased the game the Birds' Abonga Matthews tried his luck from the right corner, his powerful shot going wide."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Birds put pressure on Spartans' back line, and their skipper Irvin George cleared a dangerous ball.","html":"Birds put pressure on Spartans' back line, and their skipper Irvin George cleared a dangerous ball."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Following a malicious tackle inside the box by the Spartans' back line, Kholiso Sonjica's shot from the penalty spot was saved by Ngutyana - during the last minutes of the game.","html":"Following a malicious tackle inside the box by the Spartans' back line, Kholiso Sonjica's shot from the penalty spot was saved by Ngutyana - during the last minutes of the game."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"'Great feeling'","html":"'Great feeling'"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Radebe told the Knysna-Plett Herald that winning their first home game in 2025 was \"a great feeling, and as a team we needed it - to bring more in our home league games\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He emphasised that they wanted to win their home matches to please their many supporters.","html":"He emphasised that they wanted to win their home matches to please their many supporters."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
